entries.risk: Second provider request body builder can drift from DeepSeek thinking/tool contract.
entries.requiredAction: P1 must prove all DeepSeek chat/tool/thinking bodies route through canonical owner helper.

entries.risk: Legacy ToolBus and canonical ToolCallResult can coexist as competing contracts.
entries.requiredAction: P4 must keep legacy/provider/MCP shapes normalized at Tool Gate before ledger/recovery/TUI.

entries.risk: Swarm/forked agent paths can become a second agent orchestrator.
entries.requiredAction: P6 must keep agent modes to serial worker or disjoint fanout evidence packets.

entries.risk: TUI can render separate local state instead of consuming work-state/ledger evidence.
entries.requiredAction: P7 must prove TUI/CLI/stream-json/final report consume the same compact projection.

entries.risk: Multiple prompt stacks can inflate prompt and break DeepSeek prefix cache.
entries.requiredAction: P2 must lock stable prefix, move volatile runtime facts to dynamic tail, and explain cache epoch changes.

entries.risk: Package script surface is too large for public product claims.
entries.requiredAction: P0 command catalog classifies product-runtime, validation, release-only, owner-review, live-provider, historical evidence, and utilities.

entries.risk: Mock/internal smoke can be promoted into a public 90/95 or formal benchmark claim.
entries.requiredAction: P8 must require comparable raw transcript, tool trace, cost/cache, and failure-recovery evidence before public claim.

entries.risk: Recovery variants can disagree on retry/replan/rollback/abort.
entries.requiredAction: P5 must expose one Recovery Decision Table and write decisions into ledger/TUI/final report.

entries.risk: Verification can remain advisory while final answer says PASS.
entries.requiredAction: P3 must make mutation verification envelope visible and final claim gate reject unverified PASS.

rule: Complexity risks are controlled by folding work into the existing V4 product core owners. A risk marked contained still requires later-stage focused acceptance before release claims.
